findings.native_rationale: Joriy ibora ikki kun oldin ma'nosini aniq bermaydi, odatda kechaga yaqin talqin qilinadi.
findings.notes: Aniq vaqt ofseti uchun sonli variant afzal.
findings.adjudicated_rationale: Confirmed: "o`tgan kun" is semantically vague in Uzbek and does not reliably encode an exact two-day offset; "2 kun avval" is precise and natural for deterministic humanization.
findings.adjudicated_notes: Second-pass confirms the first-pass fix without modification.

findings.native_rationale: Joriy ibora tabiiy emas; indinga ikki kundan keyinni tabiiy va aniq ifodalaydi.
findings.adjudicated_rationale: Confirmed: "indindan keyin" is awkward and can imply a point after the day-after-tomorrow; "indinga" is the idiomatic exact form for two days from now.
findings.adjudicated_notes: Second-pass confirms the first-pass fix without modification.
